mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_reservations (train_resv_id, user_id, train_no, train_grade, depart_station, arrive_station, dep_date, arr_date, price, promotion, reserv_state, reg_date) VALUES (#{trainResvId}, #{userId}, #{trainNo}, #{trainGrade}, #{departStation}, #{arriveStation}, #{depDate}, #{arrDate}, #{price}, #{promotion}, #{reservState}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
